name: field
description: The FormField + FieldError orchestration: a label + control + description/error wrapper that auto-derives the accessible wiring (aria-invalid, the description/error ids the control points its aria-describedby at, the destructive label cue) from the per-field error, the server-first analogue of shadcn's FormControl/FormMessage. FieldError supports a single message or a deduped multi-error <ul> (the errors list), and the Field root cascades destructive text to its labels when invalid. Supports vertical/horizontal/responsive orientation and a FieldContent slot. Ships the FieldGroup, FieldSet/FieldLegend (legend/label variant), FieldTitle and FieldSeparator child partials.
docs: Copies the field partial (+ its field/group, field/set, field/title and field/separator children) to your JTE root at lievit/field.jte, reached as @template.lievit.field(forId=..., label=..., error=..., control=@`...`). The error/description ids are deterministic from forId (`<forId>-error`, `<forId>-description`); set the control's aria-describedby to the space-joined present ids and its invalid flag to (error != null) so the message is announced. Pass `errors` (a List<String>) instead of `error` for several deduped messages rendered as a <ul> in the same role=alert region; an invalid field cascades destructive text to its labels via the root. Group fields with @template.lievit.field.group / field.set (legendVariant=legend|label); head a row with @template.lievit.field.title; divide fields with field.separator. The source is yours: edit freely.
